title: Budgets
subtitle: Assign every peso a job, then track it against what you actually spend.

alloc.cardSubtitle: Spread your spendable income across Needs, Wants and Savings.
alloc.title: Where it's assigned

plan.title: This month vs plan
plan.subtitle: How your spending tracks against the targets you set.

insight.over: You're {{overBy}} over plan this month — {{category}} alone is {{categoryOverBy}} over its target.
insight.someOver_one: {{count}} category is over target, but you're still within your overall plan.
insight.someOver_other: {{count}} categories are over target, but you're still within your overall plan.
insight.onTrack: Every category is on or under target — you're {{ahead}} ahead of plan.

income.title: Net spendable income
income.subtitle: The honest base every percentage is applied to — after tax and business costs.
income.label: Net income for {{month}}
income.floorHint: What essentials cost each month. Leave blank to use the value computed from your essential targets.
income.empty: Set your net income to plan with percentages and unlock saving profiles.
income.useSuggestedAria: Use the suggested net-income base of {{amount}}
income.noSuggestion: A suggested base needs at least one month of recorded income.

pressure.Constrained: Constrained — income is {{ratio}}× your essentials floor
pressure.Stable: Stable — income is {{ratio}}× your essentials floor
pressure.Comfortable: Comfortable — income is {{ratio}}× your essentials floor

income.suggestedStrategy: Based on your income and floor, a {{profile}} profile looks like a good fit. You always choose.

savings.title: Savings
savings.subtitle: Pay yourself first — a percentage of net income across buckets.
savings.needIncome: Set your net income above to apply a saving profile.
savings.applyError: Couldn't apply that profile — try again.
savings.empty: Pick a profile to allocate savings across your buckets.
savings.floorBreach: This preset leaves essentials below your floor by {{gap}} — consider Conservative.

reprice.prompt: A new month with no targets yet. Reprice {{prior}} for {{month}}?
reprice.title: Reprice for {{month}}
reprice.intro: Carry last month's caps forward, grown by inflation. Review before applying — nothing changes until you confirm.
reprice.inflationHint: Seeded from the latest REM estimate. Edit to match your own assumption.
reprice.stepUpsHint: Add a one-off jump for a category — rent index, a tariff increase.
reprice.empty: No targets to carry forward from {{prior}}.

list.title: Categories
list.subtitle: Targets apply to the selected month only.
list.empty: No categories to budget for this month yet.

row.saveError: Couldn't save that target — try again.
row.useAvgAria: Set {{category}}'s target to its 3-month average of {{amount}}
row.noTargetHint: No target set — enter an amount to start tracking this category.

error.title: Can't load your budgets
error.description: We couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

unconverted.note_one: {{count}} transaction isn't converted to USD yet, so spend may be understated.
unconverted.note_other: {{count}} transactions aren't converted to USD yet, so spend may be understated.

rate.pending: Showing amounts in their original currency while we fetch today's rate.
